title: gtq-02-collapse-threshold

lossless_compression.reason: No live source file found for semantic addressing.

extracted_equations.text: \chi = \iiint(G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C)\,dx\,dy\,dt
= informational fidelity of the observer to the system's boundary condition.

= the critical fidelity required for non-local state collapse. Plain English: A system only undergoes real collapse if the observer's signal to the original instruction is clean enough. Master Equation
= Godhead, Measurement, Entropy, Sin, Time, Knowledge, Representation, Quantum state, Fidelity, Coherence. Note:
= effective coupling of a measurement event.
= informational fidelity. Plain English: The same physical act carries different weight depending on how cleanly the observer received the original specification. Eve's Weak Measurement
= baseline fidelity from the original transmission.

= fidelity loss from secondhand reception plus serpent-induced corruption. Plain English: Eve's signal was both indirect and actively jammed, so her fidelity dropped below the threshold. Adam's Strong Measurement

= perfect fidelity. Adam received the boundary condition directly, with no intermediary and no noise. Plain English: Adam's measurement carried full specification authority because his channel was clean. Federal Headship & Collapse Propagation
= state of all entangled subsystems under a federal head.
= fidelity of the head observer. Plain English: When the federal observer crosses the threshold, the collapse propagates to everyone under his headship. The Cross — Restoration via Perfect Fidelity

= post-Cross coherence state. Christ = the second federal observer with perfect fidelity. Plain English: Christ's substitutionary measurement re-resolves the system in the original basis, absorbing the entropy of Adam's collapse. Glossary Key terms used in this article. Definitions are drawn from how the article itself uses each term. Informational Fidelity (
) The integrated alignment of a system with the original specification. High coherence = the system is still in the basis it was made from. Entropy / Sin (

claims.text: $\chi = \iiint(G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C)\,dx\,dy\,dt$ The Master Equation describes the coherence state $\chi$ of a reality system as the integral of ten coupled factors: Godhead (G), Measurement (M), Entropy/Sin (E·S), Time (T), Knowledge (K), Representation (R), Quantum state (Q), Fidelity (F), and Coherence (C) — with the conscious observer entering the equation through its $C$-state, not as a separate variable.
claims.normalized_text: $\chi = \iiint(g \cdot m \cdot e \cdot s \cdot t \cdot k \cdot r \cdot q \cdot f \cdot c)\,dx\,dy\,dt$ the master equation describes the coherence state $\chi$ of a reality system as the integral of ten coupled factors: godhead (g), measurement (m), entropy/sin (e·s), time (t), knowledge (k), representation (r), quantum state (q), fidelity (f), and coherence (c) — with the conscious observer entering the equation through its $c$-state, not as a separate variable.
supporting_evidence: measurement
defeat_conditions: Needs an explicit failure case: what observation, logic result, or counterexample would make this claim false?

claims.text: $\chi_{\text{restored}} = \text{Measure}_{\text{Christ}}(\chi_{\text{collapsed}}) \text{ where } I_f^{\text{Christ}} = 1$ The coherence is restored by a measurement performed by a high-coherence observer with perfect fidelity to the original Source specification—Christ as the Last Adam.
claims.normalized_text: $\chi_{\text{restored}} = \text{measure}_{\text{christ}}(\chi_{\text{collapsed}}) \text{ where } i_f^{\text{christ}} = 1$ the coherence is restored by a measurement performed by a high-coherence observer with perfect fidelity to the original source specification—christ as the last adam.
